archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Dark Navy
design_philosophy: A highly functional, 'Control Room' aesthetic tailored for field operations and analytical oversight. Prioritizes data clarity, quick mobile uploads, and scanability. The interface uses a deep navy base to reduce eye strain, punctuated by high-contrast status colors (Green/Amber/Red) to instantly communicate station cleanliness.

typography.instructions: Never use 'Inter' for headings. Apply strict tracking (letter-spacing) to headings for a technical, high-end feel. Use IBM Plex Sans for tables, data, and body text to ensure maximum legibility.

colors.instructions: Strictly adhere to the dark navy palette. DO NOT use Teal (#1B93A4) anywhere. Ensure a minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text. Backgrounds should feel deep and technical, not muddy or grey.

layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: MODE B: The 'Control Room' Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout_and_spacing.cards: Use 'Technical' Grid Borders or flat 1px borders (border-slate-800). No heavy drop shadows; use subtle inner shadows or 1px strokes.
layout_and_spacing.padding: Generous internal padding for cards (p-6). Mobile views must have minimum p-4 edge padding.
layout_and_spacing.mobile_optimizations: Mobile-first grids. The Photo Upload interface must be highly touch-friendly on mobile, with a minimum touch target height of 48px for CTAs.

upload_zone.style: Large dashed border (border-2 border-dashed border-slate-700), bg-slate-900/50 hover:bg-slate-800/50 transition-colors.
upload_zone.interaction: Drag & drop support on desktop. Large touch target for camera/gallery on mobile.

data_tables.style: Flat, cardless or 1px bordered. Hover states on rows must shift background slightly (hover:bg-slate-800/50).

status_badges.style: Soft background, solid text, 1px border. Rounded-full or rounded-md depending on context. E.g., Clean = text-emerald-400 bg-emerald-400/10 border-emerald-400/20.

image_gallery.style: Grid of thumbnails (rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-slate-800).
image_gallery.interaction: Click to expand. Overlay must be crystal glass (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/80).

ai_verdict_card.style: The focal point of the report. Needs 'Burstiness' (high contrast). If Unclean, subtle red glow via drop-shadow or soft radial gradient background.

navigation.style: Solid or Crystal Glass dark header (bg-[#060B14]/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-800). Sticky top.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: All buttons must lighten on hover and include a 0.2s transition. E.g., transition-colors duration-200.
motion_and_interaction.data_loading: Use pulse animations on skeletal shapes instead of standard spinners for a premium feel.
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Subtle fade-in and slide-up (translate-y-2 to translate-y-0).

libraries_required: @phosphor-icons/react (for premium, detailed dashboard icons like upload, analytics)
recharts (for score breakdown charts and trend lines)

login_hero_bg.description: A sleek train at night stationed on a platform. Use with a heavy bg-black/60 overlay for login/upload portals.

abstract_texture.description: Elegant dark blue abstract texture. Use sparingly as a subtle background layer for AI Verdict cards or Super Admin dashboard headers at 10-20% opacity.

testing_and_accessibility.data_testids: CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on role (e.g., 'upload-photo-zone', 'submit-inspection-btn', 'override-verdict-btn', 'filter-date-picker').
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Must meet WCAG AA standards. Ensure text shadow is used if text is ever placed over images.
testing_and_accessibility.aria_labels: All icon-only buttons (like gallery image expand or delete row) must have screen-reader visible aria-labels.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a robust 'hybrid' app: A mobile-first, dead-simple Upload Portal for Station Masters, and a desktop-optimized, data-dense Dashboard for Supervisors/Admins.
Implement drag & drop using raw HTML5 events or a lightweight library, styled exactly as per the 'upload_zone' guidelines.
Use standard Shadcn components but heavily customize their background and border colors to match the Dark Navy palette (#0B1120 surfaces, border-slate-800).
Ensure the 'Overrule' mechanism in the admin panel is prominent, using a secondary button that opens a Dialog for notes.
Use Recharts for the analytics view (e.g., a bar chart showing scores area-by-area, or a pie chart for Clean vs Unclean stations).
Rely heavily on the Semantic Status colors to build a dashboard that can be read 'at a glance' from across the room.
